title: autobench.improver.delta.diff v1
description: Human-readable before/after diff of the harness applied at the iter N → N+1 boundary. Emitted after the improver runs and the new harness is computed. ``iteration`` is the new iteration this delta produces (i.e. the iteration that will run with the AFTER harness). Source: /autobench.

iteration.description: The iteration number that will run under the AFTER harness.

system_prompt_diff.description: Unified diff (difflib.unified_diff, 3 lines of context) of the system_prompt change. Empty string when unchanged.

tool_surface_diff.description: Unified diff of the tool_surface change. Empty string when unchanged.

rollout_protocol_change.description: Object {before, after} when changed; null otherwise.

context_manager_change.description: Object {before, after} when changed; null otherwise.

budget_changes.description: Map of budget-key → {before, after} for keys whose value changed. Empty when no budget keys changed.

no_change.description: True iff nothing changed across any tracked field.
